sentences.target: Wir treffen uns an der Hütte.

translations.de: Wir treffen uns an der Hütte.
translations.fr: On se retrouve à la cabane.
translations.vi: Mình gặp nhau ở căn lều.
translations.nl: We spreken af bij de hut.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (1st person plural, present); combines with a reflexive pronoun to mean 'meet (each other)'.
Personal/reflexive use of 1st person plural accusative; direct object coreferential with the subject.
Preposition governing dative in a locative sense; introduces the prepositional phrase.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; agrees with 'Hütte'.
Common noun, feminine singular dative; object of the preposition 'an'.

sentences.target: Die Hütte steht weiter oben am Hang.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈhʏtə ʃteːt ˈvaɪ̯tɐ ˈoːbn̩ am haŋ/

translations.de: Die Hütte steht weiter oben am Hang.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈhʏtə ʃteːt ˈvaɪ̯tɐ ˈoːbn̩ am haŋ/
translations.en: The hut stands further up on the slope.
translations.es: La cabaña está más arriba en la ladera.
translations.fr: La cabane est plus haut sur la pente.
translations.it: La capanna è più in alto sul pendio.
translations.yue: 小木屋喺山坡更高嘅位置。
translations.pt: A cabana fica mais acima na encosta.
translations.vi: Căn lều nằm cao hơn trên sườn dốc.
translations.nl: De hut staat hoger op de helling.
translations.hu: A kunyhó feljebb áll a lejtőn.
translations.hi: झोपड़ी ढलान पर थोड़ा ऊपर है.
translations.el: Η καλύβα βρίσκεται πιο ψηλά στην πλαγιά.
translations.nb: Hytta ligger lenger opp i bakken.
translations.id: Pondoknya berada lebih tinggi di lereng.
translations.sv: Stugan ligger längre upp på sluttningen.
translations.ro: Cabana este mai sus pe versant.
translations.da: Hytten ligger længere oppe på skråningen.
translations.ja: 小屋は斜面のさらに上にあります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative feminine singular; determines the subject noun.
Common noun, feminine singular nominative; grammatical subject.
Finite main verb (3rd person singular, present); intransitive locative predicate.
Degree/extent adverb (comparative form) modifying the locative 'oben' to form 'weiter oben' ('further up').
Locative adverb specifying position; modified by 'weiter'.
Contraction of 'an' + 'dem'; preposition with built-in definite article, governing dative; introduces a locative PP.
Common noun, masculine singular dative; object of 'am' ('an dem').

sentences.target: Ich miete die Hütte für das Wochenende.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈmiːtə diː ˈhʏtə fyːɐ̯ das ˈvɔxənˌɛndə/

translations.de: Ich miete die Hütte für das Wochenende.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈmiːtə diː ˈhʏtə fyːɐ̯ das ˈvɔxənˌɛndə/
translations.en: I’m renting the hut for the weekend.
translations.es: Voy a alquilar la cabaña para el fin de semana.
translations.fr: Je loue la cabane pour le week-end.
translations.it: Sto affittando la capanna per il fine settimana.
translations.zh-Hans: 我周末会租这间小木屋。
translations.yue: 我會租呢間小木屋過週末。
translations.pt: Vou alugar a cabana para o fim de semana.
translations.he: אני שוכר את הבקתה לסוף השבוע.
translations.vi: Tôi đang thuê căn lều cho cuối tuần.
translations.ar: أنا أستأجر الكوخ لعطلة نهاية الأسبوع.
translations.nl: Ik huur de hut voor het weekend.
translations.hi: मैं सप्ताहांत के लिए झोपड़ी किराए पर ले रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Νοικιάζω την καλύβα για το Σαββατοκύριακο.
translations.id: Aku menyewa pondok itu untuk akhir pekan.
translations.ja: 週末にその小屋を借ります。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject.
Finite main verb (1st person singular, present); takes a direct object and a prepositional complement.
Definite article, accusative feminine singular; determines 'Hütte' (direct object).
Common noun, feminine singular accusative; direct object of 'miete'.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces a temporal PP.
Definite article, accusative neuter singular; determines 'Wochenende'.
Common noun, neuter singular accusative; object of the preposition 'für'.

sentences.target: Neben der Hütte grillt mein Vater Würstchen.
sentences.reading: /ˈneːbn̩ deːɐ̯ ˈhʏtə ɡʁɪlt maɪ̯n ˈfaːtɐ ˈvʏʁstçən/

translations.de: Neben der Hütte grillt mein Vater Würstchen.
translations.ipa: /ˈneːbn̩ deːɐ̯ ˈhʏtə ɡʁɪlt maɪ̯n ˈfaːtɐ ˈvʏʁstçən/
translations.en: My father is grilling sausages next to the hut.
translations.es: Mi padre está asando salchichas junto a la cabaña.
translations.fr: Mon père fait griller des saucisses à côté de la cabane.
translations.it: Mio padre sta grigliando delle salsicce accanto alla capanna.
translations.ko: 아빠가 오두막 옆에서 소시지를 굽고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我爸爸在小木屋旁边烤香肠。
translations.yue: 我爸喺小木屋旁邊燒香腸。
translations.ru: Мой отец жарит сосиски рядом с домиком.
translations.pt: Meu pai está grelhando salsichas ao lado da cabana.
translations.he: אבא שלי צולה נקניקיות ליד הבקתה.
translations.tr: Babam kulübenin yanında sosisleri ızgarada pişiriyor.
translations.vi: Bố tôi đang nướng xúc xích bên cạnh căn lều.
translations.nl: Mijn vader grilt worstjes naast de hut.
translations.uk: Мій батько смажить сосиски біля хатинки.
translations.hu: Apám kolbászt süt a kunyhó mellett.
translations.hi: मेरे पिता झोपड़ी के पास सॉसेज ग्रिल कर रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Mój tata griluje kiełbaski obok chaty.
translations.el: Ο πατέρας μου ψήνει λουκάνικα δίπλα στην καλύβα.
translations.id: Ayahku memanggang sosis di samping pondok.
translations.sv: Min pappa grillar korv bredvid stugan.
translations.ro: Tatăl meu frige cârnați lângă cabană.
translations.cs: Můj táta griluje párky vedle chaty.
translations.da: Min far griller pølser ved hytten.
translations.ja: 父が小屋のそばでソーセージを焼いています。

tokens.explanation: Preposition governing dative; introduces a locative PP meaning proximity.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; agrees with 'Hütte'.
Common noun, feminine singular dative; object of 'Neben'.
Finite main verb (3rd person singular, present); predicates the action.
Possessive determiner, nominative masculine singular; modifies 'Vater'.
Common noun, masculine singular nominative; subject of 'grillt'.
Common noun; here most plausibly plural in accusative as the direct object (food items), articleless.
